title: Lightning DNS Seeds
description: Lightning DNS seeds use DNS queries to bootstrap nodes with no known contacts and to locate the current address of a known peer, filtering results by Lightning realm, address type, node ID, and reply count.

resources.title: BOLT 10: DNS Bootstrap and Assisted Node Location
resources.notes: Canonical specification for Lightning DNS seed queries, realm and address filters, node-ID lookup, and DNS replies.

resources.title: BOLT 07: P2P Node and Channel Discovery
resources.notes: Defines the Lightning node and channel discovery context that DNS bootstrap supplements.

resources.title: BOLT 01: Base Lightning Messaging
resources.notes: Defines the default Lightning port used by DNS seed responses.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Background for Lightning peer connectivity, routing, and network discovery.
